hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); AGENT_TYPE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // .tool_input.prompt' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$AGENT_TYPE" | grep -qi 'rewriter'; then echo 'Rewriter agent requested — this agent CAN modify files in the target project. Ensure user has approved the changes.' >&2; fi; exit 0
INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.json) jq . "$FILE" > /dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "Invalid JSON in $FILE" >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; exit 0
